title: GR_python: Symbolic General Relativity Calculator and Report Generator
description: Symbolic General Relativity calculator and report generator powered by SymPy and LaTeX. The repository supports local script-based execution, Spyder/local IDE workflows, Linux/cloud execution, and a Google Colab notebook workflow.
notes: Developed by Nelson Bolívar (GitHub: xys004) as part of Astrum Drive. Repository: https://github.com/AstrumDrive/GR_python
